perturbation.original_text: Volunteer , Trainer or Evaluator agrees to maintain the confidentiality of all Confidential Information and not misuse, misappropriate, or disclose in writing , orally or by electronic means, any Confidential Information, directly or indirectly, to any other person or use them in any way, either during the term of this Agreement or at any other time thereafter, except as is required in th e course of service to C ompanion Paws and The LifeLine Canada Foundation .
perturbation.changed_text: Volunteer , Trainer or Evaluator agrees to maintain the confidentiality of all Confidential Information and not disclose in writing , orally or by electronic means, any Confidential Information, directly or indirectly, to any other person or use them in any way, either during the term of this Agreement or at any other time thereafter, except as is required in th e course of service to C ompanion Paws and The LifeLine Canada Foundation .
perturbation.explanation: By removing the words 'misuse, misappropriate' from the obligations to the Volunteer, Trainer, or Evaluator, the text now permits the individual to misuse or misappropriate as long as they don't disclose the information, directly or indirectly. This contradicts the agreement's broader intent to protect the company from the misuse of information.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Volunteer , Trainer or Evaluator agrees to maintain the confidentiality of all Confidential Information and not disclose in writing , orally or by electronic means, any Confidential Information, directly or indirectly, to any other person or use them in any way, either during the term of this Agreement or at any other time thereafter, except as is required in th e course of service to C ompanion Paws and The LifeLine Canada Foundation .
perturbation.justification: The original text prevents 'misuse' and 'misappropriation', while the changed text removes this prohibition. The 'Contradicted Text' contains the original text, and thus prohibits misuse and misappropriation of confidential information. Therefore, the changed text directly contradicts the 'Contradicted Text' by permitting actions that were formerly prohibited.

perturbation.original_text: Volunteer , Trainer or Evaluator further agrees that upon t ermination of se rvice with Companion Paws and The LifeLine Canada Foundation , Volunteer , Trainer or Evaluator shall return within ten (10) business days all documents, files, e lectronic or otherwise, and property comprising Confidential Information of Companion Paws and The LifeLine Canada Foundation and all copies, electronic or otherwise, thereof relating in any way to Companion Paws and The LifeLine Canada Foundation’s busine ss, or in any way obtained during the course of service. Volunteer or Evaluator further agrees that no copies, electronic or otherwise, notes or abstracts of the foregoing shall be retained and that all information will be returned not destroyed.
perturbation.changed_text: Volunteer , Trainer or Evaluator further agrees that upon t ermination of se rvice with Companion Paws and The LifeLine Canada Foundation , Volunteer , Trainer or Evaluator shall return within ten (10) business days all documents, files, e lectronic or otherwise, and property comprising Confidential Information of Companion Paws and The LifeLine Canada Foundation and all copies, electronic or otherwise, thereof relating in any way to Companion Paws and The LifeLine Canada Foundation’s busine ss, or in any way obtained during the course of service.
perturbation.explanation: By removing the text: 'Volunteer or Evaluator further agrees that no copies, electronic or otherwise, notes or abstracts of the foregoing shall be retained and that all information will be returned not destroyed', this weakens the agreement, because now the Volunteer, Trainer, and Evaluator could retain, copy, and not destroy the file after the termination. This contradicts the Non -Disclosure section, since the non copies of documents.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Volunteer , Trainer or Evaluator further agrees that upon t ermination of se rvice with Companion Paws and The LifeLine Canada Foundation , Volunteer , Trainer or Evaluator shall return within ten (10) business days all documents, files, e lectronic or otherwise, and property comprising Confidential Information of Companion Paws and The LifeLine Canada Foundation and all copies, electronic or otherwise, thereof relating in any way to Companion Paws and The LifeLine Canada Foundation’s busine ss, or in any way obtained during the course of service.
perturbation.justification: The original text included a clause stating that upon termination, the Volunteer, Trainer, or Evaluator would not retain any copies or abstracts of confidential information and would return all information, not destroy it. The changed text removes this clause, implying that retaining copies or destroying the information is now permissible. This directly contradicts the requirement to return all documents, files, and property comprising confidential information mentioned in the contradicted text, as retaining copies means not all information is returned. It makes the enforcement unclear in regards to the non-disclosure of certain documentation.

perturbation.original_text: Volunteer, Trainer or Evaluator shall avoid personal and professional conflicts of interest in all matters pertaining to the Companion Paws Certification program. Conflicting interests may include but are not limite d to such areas as financial, personal relationships, and/or professional relationships.
perturbation.changed_text: Volunteer, Trainer or Evaluator shall avoid personal and professional conflicts of interest in all matters pertaining to the Companion Paws Certification program.
perturbation.explanation: Removing 'Conflicting interests may include but are not limite d to such areas as financial, personal relationships, and/or professional relationships.' reduces the text to a simple statement of intent, but eliminates the definition of conflicted interest, creating in-text contradiction, making it difficult to determine whether or not someone is in violation of this conflict of interest policy. This may also make it difficult to enforce the code of conduct which relies on this statement.
perturbation.location: Volunteer or Evaluator Conflict of Interest
perturbation.contradicted_location: Volunteer or Evaluator Conflict of Interest
perturbation.contradicted_text: Volunteer, Trainer or Evaluator shall avoid personal and professional conflicts of interest in all matters pertaining to the Companion Paws Certification program.
perturbation.justification: The original text defined what 'conflicting interests' are, while the changed text removes that definition. This creates an in-text contradiction because the contradicted text references the need to avoid conflicts of interest. By removing the definition, it becomes unclear what constitutes a conflict of interest, creating a direct contradiction in enforceability and understanding. This aligns with the 'Omissions - In Text Contradiction' definition, where essential language is removed, creating a contradiction with other sections that assume the existence of that language.
